text:
Created attachment 202676
log

When building freebsd-doc-* ports with default options on powerpc64, openjdk8 crashes.
Full log is e.g. at https://talos.anongoth.pl/data/powerpc64-default/2019-03-06_18h40m55s/logs/errors/it-freebsd-doc-52793,1.log

I'm attaching hs_err.log and java.core.
